header.title: Kbd
header.subtitle: Inline keyboard key indicator. Wraps a native kbd element with the nx-kbd class for consistent styling.

singleKey.title: Single keys
singleKey.description: Individual keys styled as physical keyboard keys.

modifierCombination.title: Modifier combinations
modifierCombination.description: Multiple Kbd elements joined by a plus sign to represent keyboard shortcuts.

sequence.title: Key sequence
sequence.description: Two or more keys pressed one after another, separated by a divider.

inlineProse.title: Inline in prose
inlineProse.description: Kbd used inline within a paragraph to call out a shortcut in context.

props.title: Props
props.description: Extends all native kbd attributes. Component-specific props listed below.

demos.prose: Press <esc>Esc</esc> to cancel or <enter>Enter</enter> to confirm.

props.className: Additional CSS classes to merge onto the kbd element.
props.children: Key label or symbol to display inside the badge.
